description: This survey assesses your sleep quality and its impact on your daily psychological and physical well-being.

questions.text: How often do you sleep enough (7-8 hours)?
How often do you go to bed late?
How often do you use phone, computer, or other screens before sleeping?
Do you fall asleep within 30 minutes after going to bed?
How often do you wake up while sleeping?
Can you sleep easily after waking up?
Do you feel rested after waking up?
Do you want to sleep more even if you slept more hours?
How often do you nap during the day?
Do you have trouble concentrating during the day due to lack of sleep?
Does lack of sleep make you irritated?
Do you fall asleep quickly when sitting quietly (during lectures or classes) or riding in a car?
Do you have problems with memorization because of poor sleep?
Does poor sleep affect your ability to think properly?
Do you have headaches after waking up or during the day?
Has anyone ever noticed you snoring or gasping during sleep?
Does anyone notice your arms or legs moving while you sleep?
How long have you had problems with your sleep?

scoring.label: Excellent Sleep Quality
scoring.description: Your sleep habits are excellent. Your psychological and physical well-being is well-supported by healthy sleep. No intervention needed.

scoring.label: Good Sleep Quality
scoring.description: Your sleep is generally healthy with minor issues. Maintaining good sleep hygiene is recommended.

scoring.label: Moderate Sleep Issues
scoring.description: You show moderate sleep disturbances that may be affecting your daily functioning. Consider improving your sleep routine.

scoring.label: Poor Sleep Quality
scoring.description: Your sleep quality is poor and is likely having a noticeable impact on your mood, concentration, and energy. Lifestyle changes are advisable.

scoring.label: Significant Sleep Disorder
scoring.description: You are experiencing significant sleep problems that are affecting your psychological well-being. Consulting a healthcare professional is recommended.

scoring.label: Severe Sleep Deprivation
scoring.description: Your sleep deprivation is severe and poses a serious risk to your mental and physical health. Please seek professional medical advice promptly.

scoring.label: Critical Sleep Crisis
scoring.description: You are in a critical state of sleep dysfunction. Immediate consultation with a medical or psychological professional is strongly advised.
